title: Type hints of generic types should specify their type parameters
description: This rule checks if type hints are correctly specified for generic types. Using unspecified generic types can lead to runtime errors and reduce code readability.
message: Missing type specification for generic type
impact: Reduces code readability and adds potential for runtime errors
recommendation: Specify the type parameters in the type hint

noncompliant.code:
from typing import List, TypeVar
T = TypeVar('T')
def func(arg: List[T]) -> None: ...
noncompliant.description: Incorrect type hint for generic type

compliant.code:
from typing import List, TypeVar
T = TypeVar('T')
def func(arg: List[str]) -> None: ...
compliant.description: Correct type hint for generic type

why_is_this_an_issue: Using unspecified generic types can lead to runtime errors and reduce code readability
how_to_fix: Specify the type parameters in the type hint

checks.message: Missing type specification for generic type
